title: Implement ferrum-fft: FFT/IFFT, real FFTs, plan caching, frequency utilities

comments.author: driver--build-ferrum-phase-0-coordinator
comments.content: Delivered: ferrum-fft fully implemented — fft/ifft, fft2/ifft2, fftn/ifftn, rfft/irfft family, hfft/ihfft, fftfreq/rfftfreq, fftshift/ifftshift, FftPlan with global cache, FftNorm (Backward/Forward/Ortho). 84 tests passing, clippy clean.
